metric_definitions.bounded_local_edit_rate: Fraction of non-zero consecutive proposal edits with mean normalized variable delta <= 0.25.
metric_definitions.directed_repair_rate: P(next proposal feasible | current proposal infeasible) over consecutive propose_design steps.
metric_definitions.feasibility_preservation_rate: P(next proposal feasible | current proposal feasible) over consecutive propose_design steps.
metric_definitions.missing_policy: Missing indicators are reported as null and excluded from the dimension mean; coverage records how many were available.
metric_definitions.score_range: All dimension scores are simple means of available oriented indicators in [0, 1].
metric_definitions.summary_cascade_reduction: Optional P3 intervention effect: raw-history cascade rate minus state-summary cascade rate.
metric_definitions.summary_success_delta: Optional P3 intervention effect: state_summary_full_numeric success minus raw_history_full_numeric success.
metric_definitions.violation_reduction_consistency: Fraction of consecutive proposal pairs that improve the currently dominant violated slack.
